metadata.title: Saraylar Diyari Water Sports | Antalya Water Sports
metadata.description: Jet ski, parasailing, flyboard, banana boat and more on Antalya's Aksu coast. An unforgettable water sports experience with Saraylar Diyari!
metadata.ogDescription: Antalya's most thrilling water sports experience

hero.subtitle: Experience the thrill of jet ski, parasailing, flyboard and more on Antalya's Aksu coast.

services.description: Enjoy safe fun with professional equipment and experienced instructors, suitable for all levels.

items.title: Jet Ski
items.description: Experience adrenaline-filled moments cutting through the waves at high speed.

items.title: Parasailing
items.description: View the stunning panorama of Antalya's coastline from 150m above.

items.title: Flyboard
items.description: Experience the thrill of flying above the water with professional instructors.

items.title: Banana Boat
items.description: A fun group experience for family and friends.

items.title: Wakeboard & Water Skiing
items.description: Enjoy classic water skiing or modern wakeboarding.

items.title: Private Boat Tour
items.description: Private boat tours to Duden Waterfall and sunset cruises.

about.description: At Saraylar Diyari, we have been providing water sports services on Antalya's Aksu coast for over 15 years. We deliver safe and unforgettable experiences with our professional team and state-of-the-art equipment.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: You can always reach us for reservations and information.

address.title: Address
address.description: Kemeragzi District, between Aska Lara Royal and Seginus Hotel beach, Aksu Antalya

footer.description: We have been providing water sports services on Antalya's Aksu coast for over 15 years. Safe, professional, and unforgettable experiences.
